name: CRAFTCHA: Alchemy Bench
description: Memorize a transient multi-branch recipe, physically route three raw materials through the correct cyclic machines, assemble their exact intermediate lineages, and deliver the requested device.
natural_language: Study the recipe before the shutter seals. Drag the three materials through the required machines, assemble the exact intermediates, and deliver the requested device. One costly recipe replay is available.

metadata.notes: Transient recipe shutter, a four-slot inventory, real raw-coordinate dragging, 6–9 solver-proven transforms, costly replay, recoverable destructive mistakes, visible intermediate lineages, cyclic machines, and independent transcript replay.
